kept.title: Justine Benjamin's Barbershop - OUR VANITY LIST
kept.note: Explicitly titled with the business name; interior shows East Coast Barbers branded shirts/gear, consistent with the brief's related-brand link. Used as hero image.

rejected.reason: Fresha listicle stock ('Best Barbers near me in Durban, Umhlanga') — generic editorial image with no confirmed tie to this specific business; Fresha images are flagged as high mis-attribution risk.
Source is 'T. Benjamins Barber Shop & Shave Parlor' — a different, similarly-named business, not Justine Benjamin's.
Source is 'Justin's Afro Hair Products' — a hair-product retailer, wrong trade and wrong name (Justin vs Justine).
Booksy generic listicle ('TOP 9 Barbers near you in Durban North') with another shop's branded backdrop poster visible; no confirmed tie to this business.
TikTok video thumbnail, not a clean photo — has letterbox bars and a baked-in play-button icon, unusable in a static photo gallery despite matching business name in source title.

stock.desc: Barber trimming a client's beard with scissors, moody warm-lit shop interior.
Flat-lay of barber tools — clippers, shears, comb, grooming products on a wood counter.
Close-up of a barber fading a client's haircut with a straight-edge comb, in-shop.

note: Only 1 real photo passed vetting (kept < 2) — stock fill was required, not optional. Photo-led hero uses real_05.jpg; gallery leads with the real photo, followed by the 3 stock images. Footer disclosure line added per SOP.

dedupeReplacements.reason: previous file was a cross-client duplicate (or unverifiable shared "real" photo) — replaced with a distinct, orchestrator-vetted Unsplash stock image on 2026-07-12
second-round dedupe: prior replacement still collided with another client's existing stock — swapped to a distinct orchestrator-vetted image on 2026-07-12
